content: MSP outage alert: Kaseya / Datto Workplace U.S. latency incident identified and unresolved

elements.text: *Confidence:* High — official vendor status; U.S.-region MSP relevance

text.text:
*Current Issue*
Kaseya says Datto Workplace is seeing elevated latency across multiple projects in the U.S. region. The incident moved from investigating to identified on Apr 3, which makes it a material update and still unresolved.

fields.text:
*Impact*
U.S.-hosted Datto Workplace file access, sync, and user workflows may be slow or inconsistent for managed clients and internal MSP operations.

text.text:
*Response*
• Warn service desk and impacted clients to expect slowness in Datto Workplace and defer non-urgent large sync or file-move activity.
• Track time-sensitive file-sharing workflows through alternate paths where possible and monitor Kaseya status for the next mitigation update.
